Finding: Seal leak detected on suction side

Recommended_Action: Schedule chemical cleaning during next planned outage.

Finding: Actuator responding slowly to pressure drops
Recommended_Action: Calibrate positioner and check air supply lines.
Halt operation and initiate emergency refractory relining to prevent thermal breach.
Perform laser alignment and check bearing health.

The field inspector recommends replacing or repairing the faulty component to resolve the internal issue with the generator, and ensuring proper maintenance and inspection of similar components in the future.
